description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from horizontal planks, with visible gaps between the boards. The box is open at the top, and one side features a hinged lid or flap that can be lifted, as seen in some views. The wood appears to be unfinished or lightly stained, giving it a natural brown color. The box sits on a flat, polygonal brown base, which may represent the ground or a platform. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas on the exterior. The design suggests it is suitable for storing or transporting items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor spaces.
description: A rectangular wooden storage box with horizontal plank construction and a hinged side lid, finished in natural brown wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the box with the side lid partially open, revealing the interior.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the open top and the full length of the box's interior.
description_view_2: Side view with the hinged lid visible on the left, showing the box's depth and construction.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the closed back side of the box with no openings or features.
